name: Restroom
description: Essential facility. Visitors will complain if you don't have one.

name: Trash Bin
description: Keeps the zoo clean and prevents visitor complaints.

name: Food Stand
description: Sells snacks to hungry visitors. Generates steady income.

name: Bench
description: A place for visitors to rest. Improves satisfaction slightly.

name: Gift Shop
description: Sells souvenirs. Visitors with high satisfaction spend more here.

name: VIP Tour
description: Exclusive behind-the-scenes tours for premium guests. High revenue!

name: Safari Ride
description: Guided truck tours through the savanna exhibits. Visitors love it!

name: Petting Zoo
description: Interactive area where kids can pet friendly animals. Family favorite!
